prompt: Two images are provided. IMAGE 1 is a scene: a woman seated in a Milos lane wearing a navy-and-white pinstripe tiered maxi dress. IMAGE 2 is the portrait of the SPECIFIC PERSON whose face must appear in the final result. COMPLETELY REPLACE the entire head and face of the woman in IMAGE 1 with the woman from IMAGE 2. The final face must clearly and unmistakably be the IMAGE 2 woman and must NOT resemble the original IMAGE 1 woman at all. Reproduce IMAGE 2's identity precisely: her fuller, slightly rounder face shape, warm golden-olive skin with light freckles across the nose and cheeks, full lips, strong defined dark eyebrows, warm brown eyes, and her long warm dark-brown SOFTLY WAVED hair (replace the straight hair with these soft waves). Keep absolutely everything else from IMAGE 1 identical: the seated pose, the navy pinstripe dress and every stripe, gather, ruched waist, tier and hem, her body and hands, the black sandals, the whitewashed ledge, plaster wall, stone, sea, and the warm late-afternoon sunlight and all shadows. ONLY the head and facial identity change. Photorealistic; light the new face with the same warm side light as the scene.
